name: ExtensionSubscriptionStatus_Subscription
title: R5: Reference to the Subscription responsible for this notification (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubscriptionStatus.subscription` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubscriptionStatus.subscription` 1..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Subscription)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SubscriptionStatus.subscription` 1..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Subscription)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubscriptionStatus.subscription` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionStatus` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionStatus.subscription` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Reference to the Subscription responsible for this notification (new)
element.comment:
Element `SubscriptionStatus.subscription` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionStatus` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionStatus.subscription` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Reference to the Subscription responsible for this notification
element.definition: The reference to the Subscription which generated this notification.
